A place to learn, and a space to grow.

The Pathshala Library holds every facility and amenity a student needs, from school right through university — open all 365 days of the year, with a reading chair that has your name on it.

Our Facilities

Built for a full day of study — or a full night of it.

First 50
Students
Free Reg.
AMENITY 01

Calm & Peaceful Study Environment

A quiet, distraction-free space built for focus.

AMENITY 02

Unlimited High-Speed WiFi

Free wireless internet, no login fee, no time limit.

AMENITY 03

RO Drinking Water (Hot & Cold)

Purified water on tap, hot or chilled, on every floor.

AMENITY 04

Fully Air Conditioned (Hot & Cool AC)

Climate-controlled reading halls, year round.

AMENITY 05

Separate Desk with Light & Charging Board

A private cabin desk, its own reading light, and a charging port.

AMENITY 06

Comfortable Seating

Ergonomic chairs built for long study sessions.

AMENITY 07

Power Backup

Uninterrupted power, even when the grid isn't cooperating.

AMENITY 08

24x7 CCTV Security

Monitored around the clock for everyone's safety.

AMENITY 09

Proper Parking Space

Dedicated, secure parking right outside.

AMENITY 10

Locker Facilities

Secure lockers to store your bag and belongings.

AMENITY 11

Rest Rooms Available

Clean, accessible restrooms throughout the building.

AMENITY 12

Daily Newspaper

Fresh newspapers laid out every morning at the reading table.

AMENITY 13

Weekly & Monthly Magazines

A rotating rack of titles, available to read in-house.

AMENITY 14

Open 24 Hours

The building never closes — come at 3 AM if that's your hour.

About the Library

The Pathshala Library provides a calm, comfortable, and well-equipped study environment designed to help students achieve their academic goals. With high-speed Wi-Fi, air-conditioned seating, 24/7 security, and modern facilities, we support focused learning, productivity, and success every day.

Card No. 002 — New Member
